title: Sandy Sniffers
description: Makes sand and red sand renewable by making sniffers able to sniff them up.
body: Sandy Sniffers offers a unique, fun, and vanilla-like way to make sand renewable. It makes sniffers able to sniff on sand and red sand and when they sniff on those two blocks, they sniff up 1-4 sand or red sand blocks, depending on the one they sniffed on.
